description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Docs that runs on push to main and on pull requests. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for Python 3.7 and 3.10. The job should check out the repository, install dependencies including texlive, inkscape, and pandoc, then install Python and pip dependencies. It should build HTML and PDF documentation using Sphinx and upload the results as artifacts. Finally, it should check links in the documentation.
